_comment: Malaysia annual CPI inflation (calendar-year %), used to deflate nominal HIES household income into constant ringgit for a real-terms doorstep line. Values are DOSM's official published annual Consumer Price Index inflation (base 2010=100), cross-checked here against the World Bank FP.CPI.TOTL.ZG series mirrored at datahub datasets/cpi (raw.githubusercontent.com/datasets/cpi) — which returns the identical figures and is the only CPI source reachable from the build sandbox (DOSM/data.gov.my hosts are proxy-blocked). base_year is the year all nominal values are expressed in: to convert a nominal value from year Y into base_year ringgit, multiply by the product of (1 + inflation_pct/100) for every year from Y+1 to base_year. Closed-year inflation is final and does not revise. Re-verify against OpenDOSM cpi_annual before printing campaign material.
